title: Cloud-Local Request Bridge
description: Bidirectional bridge: cloud dispatches tasks to local browsers/agents, local pushes results back. See: docs/prd/PRD-CLOUD-LOCAL-REQUEST-BRIDGE.md. Target: actp-worker/. Key: actp_browser_tasks Supabase table, poll every 5s, claim+execute+post result.

title: Unified Browser Agent Control
description: Safari (IG/TikTok/Twitter/Threads/Upwork) + Chrome (LinkedIn via Playwright headful). Registry, UnifiedBrowserCommand API, cloud command receiver. See: docs/prd/PRD-BROWSER-AGENT-UNIFIED-CONTROL.md. Target: Safari\ Automation/packages/

title: Prospect Acquisition Pipeline
description: keyword→top posts→top creators→follower list on IG/TikTok/Twitter/Threads. LinkedIn ICP search via Chrome. All prospects deduplicated and fed to CRMLite with score≥65. See: docs/prd/PRD-PROSPECT-ACQUISITION-PIPELINE.md

title: Upwork Autonomous Fulfillment
description: Scan Upwork for ≤4h gigs, Claude Code builds it, Vercel deploy, GitHub push, Passport backup, Telegram approval gate. See: docs/prd/PRD-UPWORK-AUTONOMOUS-FULFILLMENT.md

title: Self-Healing — Claude Code SDK + Docker
description: Failure bus, Haiku classifier, Claude Code repair agent, Docker sandbox tests, auto-deploy on pass, Telegram escalate on fail. See: docs/prd/PRD-SELF-HEALING-CLAUDE-CODE-DOCKER.md

title: Cloud Browser Orchestrator (orclit Vercel)
description: Vercel Next.js service that runs 24/7, books browser sessions from goal gaps every 30 min. Cloud version of cloud-orchestrator.js. See: docs/prd/PRD-080-CLOUD-BROWSER-ORCHESTRATOR.md. Creates: /Users/isaiahdupree/Documents/Software/orclit/. Deploys to Vercel.

title: Self-Improving Strategy Loop
description: Version-controlled strategy configs, outcome scoring, A/B testing new vs old strategies 48h, weekly Telegram report, goal-aware scoring. See: docs/prd/PRD-081-SELF-IMPROVING-STRATEGY-LOOP.md. Extends browser-session-daemon.js improvement loop.
